D4 Colorimetry L5 Evaluate Reference

Does the Hue Stay Put?

fade a saturated colour to white in CIELAB and in OKLab — watch CIELAB's blue swing to purple while OKLab holds its hue

A perceptually linear space should hold a colour's hue as it brightens toward white. CIELAB bends — blues drift purple at the midpoint. OKLab was fit to keep these lines straight.

Choose the saturated endpoint's hue. Both strips fade that colour to white — the top in CIELAB, the bottom in OKLab. The readout reports the hue measured at the 50% midpoint of each strip; a faithful space keeps it near the endpoint hue.
